entries.definition:
gh–b–n to forget, to be lacking in judgement; to weaken, to
deceive. Of this root, only تَغَابُن taghābun occurs once in the
Qur’an.

تَغَابُن taghābun [v. n. of v.VII تَغَابَنَ taghābana] attempting to
deceive one another, running each other down, bickering,
outdoing one another, mutual forgetfulness/neglect *(64:9) يَوْمُ
التَّغَابُنِ Day of Judgement [lit. the day of bickering, or, of mutual
neglect]; * التغابن name of Sura 64, Meccan sura, so-named
because of the reference in verse 9 to the ‘Day of Judgement.’
